description: Main learning videos for solving time and calendar word problems: elapsed time on a number line, finding start/end times, counting days between dates, and daily scheduling problems

videos.title: Elapsed Time on a Number Line | Solving Time Word Problems
videos.description: Learn how to use a number line to solve elapsed time word problems. Find out what time it will be, what time it was, or how much time has passed in real-life situations.
learningObjectives: Use a number line to calculate elapsed time
Solve word problems about start time, end time, and duration
Apply time and calendar skills to real-life scheduling problems

questions.question: Riya starts reading at 4:15 PM and reads for 30 minutes. What time does she finish?

standard.description: For students who scored >= 80% on readiness
